title: MWF-Ultimate
description: Guns, Armor, Backpacks, Modification, More parameters for Attachment.
body:
## MWF-Ultimate
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb58f9c328f21c8dba1f38ec4563c0ae9b327e3.png)

This is a military armed mod that will allow you, without programming knowledge, to create either simple weapons or weapons with animation and more functionality than simple weapons, and the mod also has many possibilities for various customization of weapons, as well as the ability to create weapons in survival mode.

ModularWarfare-Ultimate is a modified version of the original ModularWarfare, which has some fixes from ModularWarfare-Shining, the main new features and added to ModularWarfare-Ultimate are a crafting system and a new weapon modifier system.

- The author of the original ModularWarfare - [Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22).

## !!ALL IMPORTANT!!
- MWF-Ultimate is a fork of the MWF (Modular Warfare) mod. However, as of recently, this mod is no longer affiliated with the original MWF project in any way. I received permission from the original author, [Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22). From now on, this mod is no longer covered by [Protoxy's](https://github.com/Protoxy22) original mod license, and neither Protoxy nor anyone else has any relation to this mod anymore.

- HOWEVER! The mod is still based on the MWF framework, and I will do my best in the future to ensure full compatibility with the original MWF.

- If you have any questions regarding the mod, you can contact me directly on Discord — **ar2t1ie**.

## Important for content-pack creators:

- F9 to reload .obj models + render.json files
- F9 + SNEAK to reload the resource-packs (sounds, textures, items)

## Links (original ModularWarfare):
- Wiki: https://modularwarfare.com/docs/
- Website/Forum: https://modularwarfare.com
- ModularWarfare Discord: https://discord.gg/TtzsDXwx9M
